---
pagetitle: "Teaching "
toc: false
email-obfuscation: javascript
description: "Teaching materials and courses offered by Prof. Philipp Pelz at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg, covering computational imaging and electron microscopy."
resources:
  - "img/lecturecard_*.jpg"
header-includes:
  - |
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "ItemList",
      "itemListElement": [
        {
          "@type": "ListItem",
          "position": 1,
          "item": {
            "@type": "Course",
            "name": "Materialgenomik",
            "description": "Computational materials discovery through databases, simulation, structure representations, and machine learning. Part of the ECLIPSE Lab teaching programme at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg.",
            "url": "https://pelzlab.science/MaterialsGenomics/",
            "instructor": {
              "@type": "Person",
              "name": "Prof. Philipp Pelz",
              "sameAs": "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8009-4515"
            },
            "provider": {
              "@type": "Organization",
              "name": "ECLIPSE Lab, FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg",
              "sameAs": "https://pelzlab.science"
            },
            "eventStatus": "https://schema.org/EventScheduled",
            "eventAttendanceMode": "https://schema.org/OfflineEventAttendanceMode",
            "location": {
              "@type": "Place",
              "name": "0.68 WW building, FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg"
            },
            "startDate": "2026-04-14",
            "endDate": "2026-07-17",
            "timeRequired": "PT2H30M",
            "hasCourseInstance": {
              "@type": "CourseInstance",
              "courseMode": "face-to-face",
              "courseSchedule": {
                "@type": "Schedule",
                "byDay": ["Tuesday"],
                "startTime": "16:15",
                "endTime": "17:45",
                "duration": "PT1H30M",
                "repeatFrequency": "P1W"
              }
            }
          }
        },
        {
          "@type": "ListItem",
          "position": 2,
          "item": {
            "@type": "Course",
            "name": "Machine Learning for Processing & Characterization",
            "description": "Application-focused course on machine learning for experimental materials data, from images and spectra to process signals. Part of the ECLIPSE Lab teaching programme at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg.",
            "url": "https://pelzlab.science/MachineLearningForCharacterizationAndProcessing/",
            "instructor": {
              "@type": "Person",
              "name": "Prof. Philipp Pelz",
              "sameAs": "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8009-4515"
            },
            "provider": {
              "@type": "Organization",
              "name": "ECLIPSE Lab, FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg",
              "sameAs": "https://pelzlab.science"
            },
            "eventStatus": "https://schema.org/EventScheduled",
            "eventAttendanceMode": "https://schema.org/OfflineEventAttendanceMode",
            "location": {
              "@type": "Place",
              "name": "0.68 WW building, FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg"
            },
            "startDate": "2026-04-14",
            "endDate": "2026-07-17",
            "timeRequired": "PT2H30M",
            "hasCourseInstance": {
              "@type": "CourseInstance",
              "courseMode": "face-to-face",
              "courseSchedule": {
                "@type": "Schedule",
                "byDay": ["Tuesday"],
                "startTime": "14:15",
                "endTime": "15:45",
                "duration": "PT1H30M",
                "repeatFrequency": "P1W"
              }
            }
          }
        },
        {
          "@type": "ListItem",
          "position": 3,
          "item": {
            "@type": "Course",
            "name": "Mathematical Foundations of AI/ML",
            "description": "Foundations course for the ECLIPSE teaching track in machine learning, computational imaging, and materials data science. Covers mathematical underpinnings of modern AI/ML methods with emphasis on applications in microscopy and imaging.",
            "url": "https://pelzlab.science/MathematicalFoundationsForAIML/",
            "instructor": {
              "@type": "Person",
              "name": "Prof. Philipp Pelz",
              "sameAs": "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8009-4515"
            },
            "provider": {
              "@type": "Organization",
              "name": "ECLIPSE Lab, FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg",
              "sameAs": "https://pelzlab.science"
            },
            "eventStatus": "https://schema.org/EventScheduled",
            "eventAttendanceMode": "https://schema.org/OfflineEventAttendanceMode",
            "location": {
              "@type": "Place",
              "name": "Rm 01.156 IZNF, FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg"
            },
            "startDate": "2026-04-14",
            "endDate": "2026-07-17",
            "timeRequired": "PT2H30M",
            "hasCourseInstance": {
              "@type": "CourseInstance",
              "courseMode": "face-to-face",
              "courseSchedule": {
                "@type": "Schedule",
                "byDay": ["Monday"],
                "startTime": "10:15",
                "endTime": "11:45",
                "duration": "PT1H30M",
                "repeatFrequency": "P1W"
              }
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
    </script>
---

The ECLIPSE Lab teaches undergraduate and graduate courses in materials science and applied data science at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg. All courses are open to students in Materials Science and related programmes — see individual course cards below for enrollment links and lecture details.


```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Teaching</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

## Summer Semester 2026

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column .lecture-card style="width: 33%; background-image: url('img/lecturecard_MG.jpg');"}
```{=html}
<div class="lecture-card-overlay"></div>
<div class="lecture-card-body">
  <div class="lecture-title">Materialgenomik</div>
  <div class="lecture-meta">
    🗓️ Tue 16:15h - 17:45h<br>
    📍 0.68 WW building
  </div>
  <a href="https://pelzlab.science/MaterialsGenomics/" class="btn btn-primary lecture-link" style="align-self: flex-start;">Website</a>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column .lecture-card style="width: 33%; background-image: url('img/lecturecard_ML-PC.jpg');"}
```{=html}
<div class="lecture-card-overlay"></div>
<div class="lecture-card-body">
  <div class="lecture-title">Machine Learning for <br>Processing & Characterization</div>
  <div class="lecture-meta">
    🗓️ Tue 14:15h - 15:45h<br>
    📍 0.68 WW building
  </div>
  <!-- <a href="https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/489020" class="btn btn-secondary lecture-link" style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem; align-self: flex-start;">Studon</a> -->
  <a href="https://pelzlab.science/MachineLearningForCharacterizationAndProcessing/" class="btn btn-primary lecture-link" style="align-self: flex-start;">Website</a>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column .lecture-card style="width: 34%; background-image: url('img/lecturecard_MF-AIML.jpg');"}
```{=html}
<div class="lecture-card-overlay"></div>
<div class="lecture-card-body">
  <div class="lecture-title">Mathematical Foundations <br> of AI/ML</div>
  <div class="lecture-meta">
    🗓️ Mon 10:15h - 11:45h<br>
    📍 Rm 01.156 IZNF
  </div>
  <!-- <a href="https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/491599" class="btn btn-secondary lecture-link" style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem; align-self: flex-start;">Studon</a> -->
  <a href="https://pelzlab.science/MathematicalFoundationsForAIML/" class="btn btn-primary lecture-link" style="align-self: flex-start;">Website</a>
</div>
```
:::

::::



## Winter Semester 2025/2026

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column .lecture-card style="width: 33%; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#1a3a5c 0%,#0d2137 100%);"}
```{=html}
<div class="lecture-card-overlay"></div>
<div class="lecture-card-body">
  <div class="lecture-title">Materials & <br>Structure (MAP)</div>
  <div class="lecture-meta">
    🗓️ Tue 12:00h - 13:30h <br>
    📍 H14 Cauerstr. 3
  </div>
  <a href="https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/491742" class="btn btn-secondary lecture-link" style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem; align-self: flex-start;">Studon</a>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column .lecture-card style="width: 33%; background-image: url('img/lecturecard_BM.png');"}
```{=html}
<div class="lecture-card-overlay"></div>
<div class="lecture-card-body">
  <div class="lecture-title">Basics of Microscopy</div>
  <div class="lecture-meta">
    🗓️ Wed 12:00h - 13:30h <br>
    📍 H15 Cauerstr. 3
  </div>
  <a href="https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/496234" class="btn btn-secondary lecture-link" style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem; align-self: flex-start;">Studon</a>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column .lecture-card style="width: 33%; background-image: url('img/lecturecard_MF-AIML.jpg');"}
```{=html}
<div class="lecture-card-overlay"></div>
<div class="lecture-card-body">
  <div class="lecture-title">Mathematical Foundations of AI/ML</div>
  <div class="lecture-meta">
    🗓️ Mon 10:15h - 11:45h<br>
    📍 Rm 01.156 IZNF
  </div>
  <a href="https://www.studon.fau.de/campo/course/496690" class="btn btn-secondary lecture-link" style="align-self: flex-start;">Studon</a>
</div>
```
:::

::::
